sections.title: Confined Space Entry Permit
sections.html:
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

PERMIT DETAILS

Permit Number: [DATE]-MISH16-[SEQ]

Pre-work Conditions Checklist:

  • ☐ Area secured and barricaded
  • ☐ All personnel accounted for
  • ☐ Emergency rescue plan reviewed
  • ☐ Lockout/Tagout procedures applied
  • ☐ Ventilation system checked
  • ☐ Communication established
  • ☐ Entry supervisor designated
  • ☐ Attendant assigned
  • ☐ Entrants briefed on hazards
  • ☐ Non-entry rescue equipment ready
  • ☐ Hot work permit (if applicable) issued
  • ☐ Other hazards identified and controlled

sections.title: Confined Space Entry Permit (continued 2)
sections.html:
Work Authorization:

Work Description

Location

Start Time

End Time

Authorized By

Required Controls:

  • ☐ Continuous atmospheric monitoring
  • ☐ Supplied air respirator (SAR) available
  • ☐ Full body harness with retrieval line
  • ☐ Standby person (attendant) present
  • ☐ Explosion-proof lighting
  • ☐ Non-sparking tools
  • ☐ Communication system (e.g., two-way radio)
  • ☐ Ventilation fan in operation

Atmospheric Testing Log:
